title: FileType
description: describes the file type filters used in the collection (this object is optional)

analyzeSignatures.description: when `true`, read the beginning of each file to determine file type.  When `false` use filename extension only to determine file type.

mode.description: One of `Include` or `Exclude` - include or exclude the file types listed in the `extensions` array

extensions.description: array of one or more file type extensions
